testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
00:41:47.807 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [cl.skyscraper.payments.PaymentsApplicationTests]: PaymentsApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 00:41:47.861 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration cl.skyscraper.payments.PaymentsApplication for test class cl.skyscraper.payments.PaymentsApplicationTests 00:41:47.904 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [cl.skyscraper.payments.PaymentsApplicationTests]: PaymentsApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 00:41:47.905 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration cl.skyscraper.payments.PaymentsApplication for test class cl.skyscraper.payments.PaymentsApplicationTests
